# System Design Template

## Purpose

Use this template to describe how a solution satisfies requirements through components, flows, integrations, and operational behavior.

## Template Body

```md
# System Design: <Title>

Status: Draft | Active | Archived

## Problem

Describe the problem being solved.

## Scope

Level: Container | Direction: <name> | Service: <name>

### In Scope

- <Scope item>

### Out of Scope

- <Scope item>

## Requirements Links

- [<Requirement document>](<relative-link>)

## Proposed Design

Describe the design at component and flow level.

## Components Involved

| Component | Responsibility |
| --- | --- |
| <Component> | <Responsibility> |

## Data Flow

- <Flow step>

## Integration Points

- <Integration and contract link>

## Failure Scenarios

- <Failure mode and expected behavior>

## Security Considerations

- <Security concern or control>

## Operational Considerations

- <Monitoring, rollout, scaling, support, or recovery note>

## Alternatives

- <Alternative and reason not selected>

## Risks

- <Risk and mitigation>

## Related ADRs / Contracts / Diagrams

- [<Document title>](<relative-link>)
```
